allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("C:\\Program Files\\Blender Foundation","C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Blender Foundation"\); foreach\($p in $paths\){ if\(Test-Path $p\){ Get-ChildItem $p -Recurse -Filter blender.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName } }; $c = Get-Command blender -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($c\){ "ONPATH: " + $c.Source }; "winget-check-done")
